title.rendered: Goodbye OMT, Welcome to Travel FX

content.rendered:
From today Overseas Money Transfers will be provided by our sister company Travel FX Ltd.

Overseas Money Transfers was created in 2011 to offer our clients a fast efficient, trouble-free way to transfer small sums overseas. Our mission has always remained the same, to offer bank beating rates by an alternative process to the expensive and time-consuming traditional methods of money transfer or the expensive services of the banks.

We have quickly grown into one of the leading providers of foreign currency to the public due to our expertise, technological structure, and unwavering commitment to provide you with a level of service unrivalled in our industry.

By combining our service with Travel FX Ltd we continue to offer the same international money transfer service while moving forward focusing on great rates, service, convenience and security for your data and money.

With Travel FX we are able to offer better rates on your international money transfers.

For existing customers, the process is improved, and for new users making your first transfer is simple! Start a transfer here.

All customers will now have access to a client area where you can track and see the status of your transfers. You can also save recipient details for possible transfers in the future.

We use industry-leading technology that protects your money and guarantees it arrives safely every time.

We are humbled by the many thousands of clients that we have provided international money transfers to over the years and we thank you for being part of this journey with us. We are excited to continue providing this service to many thousands more.

Find out more about Travel FX here.

itemListElement.name: Goodbye OMT, Welcome to Travel FX

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
